title: Dekton Dry Cut Segmented Diamond Tipped Blade- Ideal For Masonry, Granite, Marble And Concrete| 115mm Size Disc With 22mm Core| Segmented Blade| Diamond Tipped For Durability| Long-lasting Performance
features: Versatile Cutting: Ideal for cutting through a variety of tough materials including masonry, granite, marble, and concrete. Whether you're working on home improvement projects or professional construction, this blade offers exceptional performance across different surfaces.

Segmented Blade Design: Dekton Dry Cut Segmented Diamond Tipped Blade Features a segmented edge that allows for efficient cutting and minimal friction. This design ensures clean and precise cuts, enhancing your productivity and reducing material waste during your projects.

Diamond Tipped Durability: Dekton Dry Cut Segmented Diamond Tipped Blade Equipped with high-quality diamond tips, the blade delivers superior durability and strength. The diamond tips ensure that the blade maintains its sharpness and cutting efficiency even after prolonged use.

Optimal Size and Fit: The blade measures 115mm in diameter with a 22mm core, making it compatible with a wide range of angle grinders. This size offers a perfect balance between cutting power and precision, making it suitable for both detailed work and larger cutting tasks.

Long-Lasting Performance: Designed for extended use, the Dekton blade provides long-lasting performance. Its robust construction and advanced materials mean you won't need to replace it frequently, saving you both time and money. Specifically designed for dry cutting applications, this blade minimizes dust and mess compared to wet cutting methods.
description: Introducing the Dekton Dry Cut Segmented Diamond Tipped Blade, a premium cutting solution designed for superior performance on a range of tough materials. Engineered specifically for masonry, granite, marble, and concrete, this 115mm size disc is the perfect choice for both professional contractors and DIY enthusiasts seeking precision and durability in their cutting tasks. The blade features a segmented design that enhances cutting efficiency, allowing for smooth and fast cuts through hard materials. Its diamond-tipped edge ensures exceptional durability and long-lasting performance, reducing the need for frequent replacements and minimizing downtime on the job. The 22mm core of the blade is crafted to provide enhanced stability and support, ensuring a consistent cutting experience. This core size contributes to the blade's strength and resilience, making it ideal for heavy-duty applications. Whether you are working on a construction site, remodeling project, or any task requiring reliable cutting power, the Dekton Dry Cut Segmented Diamond Tipped Blade delivers precision and efficiency with every use. The blade’s dry-cutting capability allows for clean cuts without the need for water, making it suitable for a variety of cutting environments. This feature is particularly useful for projects where water might be inconvenient or impractical. With its high-quality construction and advanced design, the Dekton Dry Cut Segmented Diamond Tipped Blade is an indispensable tool for achieving professional-grade results.
